nasb.text: But the other answered, and rebuking him said, “Do you not even fear God, since you are under the same sentence of condemnation?

esv.text: But the other rebuked him, saying, “Do you not fear God, since you are under the same sentence of condemnation?

cnv.text: 另一個就應聲責備他說：“你是同樣受刑的，還不懼怕　神嗎？

ccb.text: 另一个罪犯却责备他说：“你同样是受刑的，难道不怕上帝吗？

csbs.text: 另一个就应声斥责他，说：“你既然同样受惩罚，还不怕神吗？
